channel.title: Comments for page "Three Farewells"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Three Farewells"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
The links above have been fixed. There was a change in how the wiki handled fragment pages a while back and the links here never got updated. That has been corrected now. Good catch.

As for getting a new perspective on the first page, you need to wait 60 seconds minimum before refreshing will give you a new page, just as with the random page feature.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Can someone enlighten me, what happened with Aktus and Navarro perspectives? The links posted here by the author seem to lead to nonexistent pages and reloading doesn't work either.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Holy hell, how did that happen…
Well, its been fixed. Thanks for that.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: An excellent set of stories. Great job. One little quibble, though-you misspelled Glioblastoma Multiforme.

item.title: WORLDBUILDING
item.content:encoded:
Hey, I actually wrote something. That's different. And it's about Navarro!… and not Aldon. Hmm. Oh well. Hopefully y'all like this anyway.

I will say I enjoyed this little collab, and had fun bringing up some characters I've written already. Namely Alexandra Radcliffe and… well, Daniel Navarro.

item.title: such avatar wow much names
item.content:encoded:
This was a lot of fun to work on. These two are fucks, but they're alright fucks.

My tale references the previously mentioned characters, as well as one of my own, Dr. Karlyle Aktus, the Director of Site 81. Of the three main characters, Aktus definitely has the slimmest body of work, considering he's really only been featured in a handful of in-article notes, but I hope to have a couple of tales concerning his character out before too long.

Hope you guys enjoy this as well. My thanks to everybody who went through this (and the other tales) in chat, including Chubert and vezaz. It is much appreciated :D

item.title: That world building tho...
item.content:encoded:
Hello one and all.

This here tale is a collab between myself, djkaktus, and TwistedGears. Since each of us has already made content on the site with our author avatars, we thought it might be fun to do something with all three of them together. After all, one author avatar is good. Three must therefore be the best.

I can't speak for my fellow writers, but I had a lot of fun working on this, so I hope you all enjoy.

For those of you wanting access to all perspectives now:
Conwell
Aktus
Navarro
Enjoy the pie.

For my references, the characters of Conwell, Collins and Dr. Zachary Johnson are from the Peregrine series of tales.
